Here’s what you should know if you are planning to travel to the Summer Olympic Games.

Here’s what you should know if you are planning to travel to the Summer Olympic Games.

This article is over a year old, and the information within may be out of date.

Thinking of visiting Paris, France during the Olympics? Flights are still available.

The 2024 Summer Olympic Games in Paris run July 26 to Aug. 11.

Here’s a look at how much hotel rooms cost in Paris, how much a flight might run you to get there and some other important information you should know if travelling to Paris, France.

Based onbooking.comsearch results as of Tuesday, July 23, a six-night stay for two adults beginning Friday, July 26 in Paris could run you as little as $548 (Canadian) fora studio apartmentthat’s 4.1 kilometres from the city’s centre, with a review score of 5.5.

If you wanted to go for the entire duration of the Olympics, you could getanother studio apartmentlocated 3.5 kilometres from the city centre for 16 nights at a price of $1,524.

If you’re hoping for something with better reviews, aone-bedroom apartmentwith a score of 8.6, located 4.4 kilometres from the city centre, could be had for six nights for $605.

If you’d rather be in a hotel room, you can get in at a price of $622 for six nights at alocation2.4 kilometres from the city centre, but with a score of 4.8.

If you need accommodations with a better review, ahotel roomwith a score of 8.8 and located four kilometres from the city centre can be yours for $968 for six nights.

If you require something grander, your six-night stay could run you $24,357 if you opt for atwo-bedroom, two-bathroom unitat the Black Door Paris Marbeuf.

Airbnb also has rooms available, including astudio apartmentin Paris at a price of $771 for six nights.

There are plenty of hotel booking sites out there. Have fun and maybe you’ll be inspired to travel.

So, you’ve got a place to stay, but now you need to get to Paris and back.

If you’re travelling from Pearson Airport, there were nonstop round-trip flights on Friday, July 26 to Paris still available with Air Transat for as little as $1,218, based on anexpedia.casearch on Tuesday, July 23.

Several other flights were showing tickets available for less than $1,500.

The Canadian government warns travellers to France to exercise a high degree of caution due to the elevated threat of terrorism.

France’s prime minister raised the security threat level to “urgence attentat” (attack emergency), which is the highest level in France’s Vigipirate plan.

What that means is that when you are in France, you can expect enhanced security measures and an increased police presence at the border and in public places, and you are advised to watch local media for the most recent information and follow the instructions of local authorities.

Additionally, during the Olympics, especially in Paris, you can expect an increased presence of security forces, major disruptions to traffic and movement, large crowds and public gatherings and an increase of petty crime such as theft and pickpocketing.

The Canadian government adds there is a threat of terrorism in Europe and a number of premeditated attacks have occurred in France over the past few years and that further attacks are likely.

More information on travel warnings is available on the Canadian government’swebsite.

title: How much are hotel rooms, flights to Paris during Olympics?
author: Dominik Kurek
description: Here’s what you should know if you are planning to travel to the Summer Olympic Games.
